title: Mobstein : Revive animals and necromancy!
description: Adds new utilities for useless vanilla animals and a new Frankenstein mob
body:
# Mobstein

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/UHqXi6gHWXY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88fa175a2fc3481b511bbd6126b946d18ad23991.png)

### Overview
Mobstein gives new life to some of the most underrated mobs in Minecraft. Through a resurrection process, players can revive enhanced versions of axolotls, dolphins, ocelots, bats, rabbits, silverfish, and even golems. Each resurrected creature has unique abilities and behaviors that expand your gameplay experience.  

### Taming
Resurrected mobs can be tamed with special items:  
- **Bats** → Pumpkin Pie  
- **Ocelots** → Salmon  
- **Frankenstein Golem** → Iron Ingots  
- **Dolphins** → Any Fish  
- **Axolotls** → Tropical Fish Bucket  
- **Silverfish** → Stone & Cobblestone  
- **Rabbits** → Golden Carrot / Carrots  
- **Turtles** → Seagrass  
- **Pandas** → Bamboo  
- **Polar Bears** → Any Fish  
- **Spiders** → Egg  

### Perks
There are 4 types of perks: Attack, Health, Speed, and Template.  
- **Life**: 20–40  
- **Attack**: 0.8–2  
- **Speed**: 0.3–0.5  
Use the template perk to craft others (recipes viewable with JEI).  

### Machines
- **Clinical Stretch**: Used to revive mobs by placing their bodies on the bed. Works at night with lightning strikes.  
- **Surgery Stretch**: Used to combine heads, bodies, and perks into new creations.  
- **Organ Extractor**: Extracts organ parts from complete bodies using tweezers.  

### Resurrected Mobs
- **Iron Frankenstein Golem**: 150 HP, anti-knockback, grants Speed effect within 8 blocks, customizable with suits.  
- **Axolotl**: Attacks enemies you target, swims quickly.  
- **Ocelot**: Tameable with salmon, can sit, has collar dye options, very fast in combat.  
- **Dolphin**: Assists in fights, agile swimmer.  
- **Bat**: 25 HP, attacks enemies, flies during combat.  
- **Silverfish**: Attacks enemies you target.  
- **Rabbit**: Attacks enemies you target.  

### FAQ
**How do I get screws?**  
Dropped by Frankenstein Golems.  

**Will this mod add structures?**  
Yes, future versions will include unique structures.  

**Is Mobstein inspired by another mod?**  
Mobstein is original. It has a similar concept to an old mod, but was developed independently.  

**Can I review this mod?**  
Of course! You are free to make as many reviews as you want. Just include the download link in your description and you may even be credited.
